name: SEAMUS
title: THE LAST BREATH

abilities.name: Demise ("Did... Did We Get Him?")
abilities.text: Once per turn. When this model is killed, it may drain a (soulstone) and place in base contact with a model with an Aura (Concealment) token. If it does, this model heals 10.

abilities.name: Ruthless
abilities.text: This model ignores the (unusual_defense) abilities of other models.

abilities.name: (unusual_defense) Terrifying
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

actions.name: Alone in the Dark
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this model is in concealing terrain, this attack receives a (+). If there are no different enemy models within 2" of the target, this attack's raise value becomes 3.

triggers.name: Lovely Surprise
triggers.text: After killing, summon a Dead Doxy with 3 health in base contact with this model.

triggers.name: Shove Aside
triggers.text: Once per activation. Move the target 4". Then, this model moves up to 4" and may declare a (melee) action targeting a different model.

triggers.name: Execute
triggers.text: The target may either discard a card or drain a (soulstone). If it does neither, it is killed.

actions.name: True Terror
actions.effects: Target gains an Aura (Concealment) token. If this attack receives a raise, deal 1 damage to the target and enemy models within (x)2" of it.

triggers.name: On Your Heels
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the target.

actions.name: Secret Passage
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may only be declared if this model is within 1" of blocking terrain.
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range within 1" of blocking terrain.

triggers.name: Sudden Strike
triggers.text: This model may declare a (melee) action.

triggers.name: The Fog Rises
triggers.text: This model gains an Aura (Concealment) token.

merge_warnings: Title mismatch: front='THE LAST BREATH' back='The Last Breath'
extraction_notes: Madness and Malice and Copycat Killer ability text not visible on card front
Unusual defense icon (shield with U) appears before Terrifying ability
